shortDescription: Periodic executive summaries for the virtual company owner — infrastructure burn, internal ledger, open invoices, risk highlights, and forward-plan framing
orchestratorUseCases: generate a periodic executive summary combining Azure burn rate and internal bookkeeping data
produce a weekly or monthly owner update with expenses, revenue, open invoices, and risk highlights
get a combined company status overview without querying individual budget and ledger tools separately
useWhen: user wants a company overview, status report, or executive summary
user asks for a weekly or monthly update on the virtual company
user wants burn rate, revenue, ledger summary, and risk in one output
avoidWhen: user only wants Azure infrastructure costs — use budget_get_status instead
user only wants raw bookkeeping data — use ledger_get_summary instead

tools.name: hr_generate_owner_report
tools.description: Generates a combined executive summary for the virtual company owner. Pulls Azure infrastructure burn rate from cost management and internal bookkeeping data from the ledger. Returns a structured owner report with burn rate, internal revenue and expenses, open invoices, net balance, and risk highlights. Use when the user asks for a company status update, weekly/monthly summary, or owner overview.

period.description: Time period for internal ledger data aggregation. Defaults to 'this-month'. Azure burn rate is always month-to-date.

useWhen: user wants a company overview or status report
user asks for an executive summary of the virtual company
user wants a weekly or monthly update
user asks about company health, burn rate, revenue, or risk combined
avoidWhen: user only wants Azure infrastructure costs — use budget_get_status instead
user only wants ledger bookkeeping data — use ledger_get_summary instead
tools.returnsSummaryShape: formatted executive summary markdown with infrastructure burn, ledger summary (revenue/expenses/invoices/net), and risk highlights
